title: Line Walking Challenge
description: A near-whisper coach for heel-to-toe walking, quiet carrying, balance, and calm slow movement.
learningGoals: Build concentration through slow heel-to-toe walking
Practice balance while changing arm and carrying positions
Use slow movement and breathing for self-calming
interactionModel: follow each spoken real-world movement prompt, watch the calm timer, then tap the large current-step card when finished
feedbackModel: serene spoken coaching with tick, sparkle, and tada SFX; praise celebrates slowness, control, and practice

modes.title: The Quiet Line
modes.skill: slow heel-to-toe walking and calm balance

modes.title: Carry Challenge
modes.skill: controlled walking while balancing and carrying

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
